Fix uses BASH_SOURCE[0] of the function to derive `${SELF_DIR}/../shared/wal-flusher.mjs`, which resolves the dev-tree script regardless of cwd or install state. SBOX repro under simulated empty AIOS now emits the success line and exits 0. Local: 1123/1123 PASS, sqlite_wal_checkpoint_test.sh 13/13. Files: src/bin/ai (+6 lines, locator chain only). Commit: f4d54bf, pushed to origin/master, fresh CI run 25612953667 in flight. | Files: .ai/DIGEST.md, .ai/TASKS.md, .ai/state.json

E-60: Per-task anomaly detection in verify_markdown_sync (Tier 2). Replaced count-based check in src/mcp/task-synchronizer-mcp/index.js with per-task cross-reference of TASKS.md checkboxes vs state.sqlite. Detects 4 drift types: (1) id in md but missing from state, (2) [x] in md but status != DONE in state, (3) [ ] in md but status == DONE in state, (4) id in state but missing from md. Auto-regenerates TASKS.md only on missing-row drift (1 and 4); checkbox-mismatch drift (2 and 3) is human-decision territory and surfaces verbatim. Header tampering still flagged. Emits structured `__SYNC_RESULT__ {status, anomalies, auto_fixes}` JSON tail for programmatic consumers (skills, CI, hooks). Mirrored to ~/.ai-os/mcp/task-synchronizer-mcp/index.js for live process pickup on restart. New behavioral test tests/suites/verify_sync_per_task_test.sh (16 assertions) drives the real MCP via stdio JSON-RPC across all 4 drift cases + clean state + header tamper + JSON-tail parse. Tests: 1123→1139 PASS (+16). Files: src/mcp/task-synchronizer-mcp/index.js (-37 +91), tests/suites/verify_sync_per_task_test.sh (new, 200 lines), ~/.ai-os/mcp/task-synchronizer-mcp/index.js (mirror). | Files: .ai/TASKS.md, .ai/state.json, src/mcp/task-synchronizer-mcp/index.js, src/shared/skills/ai-handoff/SKILL.md, src/shared/skills/ai-preflight/SKILL.md

E-61: Wire verify_markdown_sync into ai-preflight + ai-handoff skills (Tier 1). src/shared/skills/ai-preflight/SKILL.md gains "Step 4 — Verify markdown↔state sync" between Step 3 (TASKS.md) and Step 5 (deltas) with explicit guidance on resolving each anomaly class. src/shared/skills/ai-handoff/SKILL.md gains "Step 0 — Verify state is consistent before packaging" with rationale (next agent plans against COMM.md, fiction here propagates downstream). Both skills add `mcp__task-synchronizer-mcp__verify_markdown_sync` to allowed-tools frontmatter. Mirrored to ~/.ai-os/shared/skills/ai-preflight/SKILL.md and ~/.ai-os/shared/skills/ai-handoff/SKILL.md. Registry already permits the tool (no change needed). Files: src/shared/skills/ai-preflight/SKILL.md (+18 lines), src/shared/skills/ai-handoff/SKILL.md (+17 lines), 2 ~/.ai-os mirrors. Tests: 1139/1139 PASS (no test added — wiring is documentation-only and covered by skill/agent end-to-end behavior). | Files: .ai/TASKS.md, .ai/state.json, src/mcp/task-synchronizer-mcp/index.js, src/shared/skills/ai-handoff/SKILL.md, src/shared/skills/ai-preflight/SKILL.md
